channel.title: pbdb on Peter D Smits
channel.description: Recent content in pbdb on Peter D Smits

item.title: Connecting Macrostrat and Paleobiology Database
item.description: As a small project before I change careers, I’ve gone back to exploring the fossil record of the Ordovician and Silurian through the lens of how well does lithology predict the observed diversity or richness of fossils. This exploration requires data from the Macrostrat and Paleobiology Database databases. While these two databases share a lot of similar ideas, they are not directly linked. Instead, Macrostrat entries have information linking them to PBDB occurrences and collections.
